caption: A woman with dark curly hair tied up and wearing large black headphones sits at a desk in a studio setting. She is dressed in a dark green t-shirt with a red graphic design. In front of her is a professional black microphone on a stand. Behind her is a dark backdrop featuring a blue-toned image of hands and white text that reads "SS TALK IOT," "It's A Unique Hustle," "DCAST," and "About It!". To her right, additional text on the banner says "th U". Small logos that say "BOSS TALK 101" appear in the lower portions of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman speaks, shifting her facial expressions and slightly tilting her head as she communicates. The camera angle and the arrangement of the equipment remain static as she talks.
